characters.name: Agile
characters.description: AgileMangaRaceHuman Agileis a servant ofRazlo the Tri-Punisher of Deathand a member of theEye of Michael. Agile who wears what appears to be an environmental hazard suit.

characters.name: Alex
characters.description: Alexwas a friend of Rem's that supported her through troubled times, and it's implied they may have been lovers. His death caused Rem to join Project Seeds as a way to start over. Rem also asks for him to give her strength when she sacrifices herself to save all the other humans on the Seeds ships.

characters.name: Amelia Ann McFly
characters.description: Amelia Ann McFlyAnime (1998)Appears inTrigun: Badlands RumbleRaceHumanAge19~20 yearsHeight5'4" (163cm)Family*GasbackUnnamed mother Amelia Ann McFly(アメリア・アン・マクフライ,,Ameria An Makufurai?)is a female bounty hunter that appears in the 2010 movie,Trigun: Badlands Rumble. Amelia has long maroon hair and blue eyes. She wears a cowboy hat, a tan brown long coat loose light violet/white blouse underneath a black "x" stitched corset, magenta jeans? with double belts. Amelia comes off as a blunt woman with no tolerance for lecherous men mainly due to her acute contact dermatitis.Vash's advances toward her notably irks her, also her desire for vengeance against Gasback is 2nd to none. Her desire for revenge makes her look bad-tempered towards people that try to get close to her, infact she prefers not to say anything about her-self.  She is angry and reserved most of the time, but when her heart is touched by Vash's altruism, she starts to show a more emotional and soft side of her.
characters.personality_section: Amelia comes off as a blunt woman with no tolerance for lecherous men mainly due to her acute contact dermatitis.Vash's advances toward her notably irks her, also her desire for vengeance against Gasback is 2nd to none. characters.name: Badwick
characters.description: BadwickAnime (1998)RaceHumanHeight5'8" (173cm)FamilyUnnamed mother and father Badwickis a character that appears in the anime episodeLittle Arcadiaand the manga chapterSon. Badwick has dark brown hair and eyes. He wears a grey vest over the blacktop, blue jeans, and light brown shoes. Although he comes off as mean and irascible, Badwick is really a good-natured man who loves his parents.
characters.personality_section: Although he comes off as mean and irascible, Badwick is really a good-natured man who loves his parents.

characters.name: Balzac Beauregard
characters.description: Balzac BeauregardMangaKanjiバルザックボウルガードRomajiBaruzakku BourugādoDebutTrigun: Badlands Rumble Extra 1RaceModified Human Balzac Beauregard(バルザックボウルガード,Baruzakku Bourugādo) is a cyborg and ex-first lieutenant of the 14th military policeman regiment. Balzac is a large man with a cyborg body. He has multitude of body modifications and body replacements. His arms are replaced and his right arm fingers have guns in them. Balzac used to be a lieutenant in the military policeman regiment, but quit to become bounty hunter and chase after quick money.
characters.personality_section: Balzac used to be a lieutenant in the military policeman regiment, but quit to become bounty hunter and chase after quick money.

characters.name: Brilliant Dynamites Neon
characters.description: –B.D. Neon Brilliant Dynamites NeonAnime (2023)Anime (1998)MangaDebutEpisode 1:No Man's Land(Wanted poster)Appears inTrigun StampedeRaceHumanAlternate names*BD NeonBDNNeonDebutEpisode 7:B.D.N.Appears inTrigun (anime)RaceHumanHeight6'4" (193cm)Appears inTrigun (manga)RaceHuman Brilliant Dynamites Neonis the leader of the Bad Lads Gang, a band of thieves operating on the planet Gunsmoke. While he is a thug, B.D.N. is also an excellent tactician, charismatic leader, and a man of honor. Despite this, he is not above murdering innocent people, such as his willingness to shoot the youngKaitein cold blood after he refused to cooperate He has a strong fascination for all things glowing and flashing, which extends into a very showman-like personality. He holds skill and dedication in high regard, respecting Kaite for the effectiveness with which he disarmed the sand steamer Flourish, one of the helmsmen of the Flourish for his willingness to sacrifice himself for the ship, andVashfor his skill.

characters.name: Caine the Longshot
characters.description: –Nicholas D. Wolfwood on Caine Caine the LongshotAnime (1998)DebutTrigun Episode 23: ParadiseRaceHumanHeight5'11" (180cm) Caine the Longshotis an anime-only member of theGung-Ho-Guns. He replacesLivio the Double Fangas the last member of the gang. Cain is cold-blooded and never speaks. He is very patient as he can hide himself and wait for his targets to show up. He also is determined and not feared by death, as he chooses to commit suicide either because he failed to kill Vash or because he doesn't want to deal withMillions Knives.

He also is determined and not feared by death, as he chooses to commit suicide either because he failed to kill Vash or because he doesn't want to deal withMillions Knives.

characters.name: Chapel
characters.description: This page is for the manga character Chapel. For the anime-only character, seeChapel the EvergreenChapelAnime (2023)MangaDebutEpisode 7:Wolfwood (episode)Appears inTrigun StampedeAlternate namesMaster CAppears inTrigun MaximumRaceHuman Chapel(チャペル,,Chaperu?)is one of the leading members of theEye of Michael, an organization of assassins founded by a church that worshipsPlants. His true name is never given, and he is only ever identified by his title "Chapel" or asMaster C. He is the one who trainedNicholas the Punisher,Livio the Double Fang, andRazlo the Tri-Punisher of Death. Razlo noted that although Chapel rarely took apprentices, he formed near-fanatical bonds of attachment with the apprentices that he did take. After a young Razlo had killed nine of the organization's finest on a rampage, Chapel was asked to take responsibility for it because he was Razlo's teacher. He pleaded for Razlo to be trained instead of executed because he knew that Razlo held an unparalleled power. To show that he valued Razlo's development over his own life, he slid his regenerative drugs across the table and shot himself. Razlo, astonished by this, realized that, until then, no one had ever needed him so desperately as Chapel did. Chapel became the first person that Razlo actually cared about.

characters.name: Chapel the Evergreen
characters.description: Chapel the EvergreenAnime (1998)DebutEpisode 23:ParadiseAppears inTrigun (anime)RaceHuman –Chapel the Evergreen Chapel the Evergreen(チャペル・ザ・エバーグリーン,,Chaperu za Ebāgurīn?)is an anime-only character and a member of theGung-Ho-Gunswho raised and trainedNicholas D. Wolfwood. Evergreen is a dogmatic and didactic person. Although he was forced to kill his former protege, Wolfwood, he was deeply scarred by doing it going as far as to confrontKnives. It's also mentioned by him that he hates being indebted to someone.
characters.personality_section: Evergreen is a dogmatic and didactic person. Although he was forced to kill his former protege, Wolfwood, he was deeply scarred by doing it going as far as to confrontKnives. It's also mentioned by him that he hates being indebted to someone.

characters.description: Chinpei Nebraska Chinpei Nebraskais one of the four Nebraska boys of the Nebraska Family. Chinpei Nebraska as seen in the manga. Not much is known about Chinpei's personality, however, he was confident in his strength. That is untilMeryldisproved it by shooting him out of the air.

characters.name: Chronica
characters.description: ChronicaAnime (2023)MangaDebutEpisode 12:High Noon at JulyAppears inTrigun StampedeRacePlantStatusAliveAppears inTrigun MaximumRacePlant Chronicais the apparent senior of two independentPlantssent from Earth in response to the Gunsmoke homing beacon. She andDominaarrive afterKniveshas been sailing the Arc for some time. Apparently, they've seen rogue Independents before, but nothing on Knives' scale. Chronica is tall, with long blonde hair. She wears a light-colored space outfit. Chronica is shown to be calm and rather intelligent. She refuses to forgive Knives for absorbing Domina into his mass collective and destroying her individual character.
characters.personality_section: Chronica is shown to be calm and rather intelligent. She refuses to forgive Knives for absorbing Domina into his mass collective and destroying her individual character.

characters.name: Chuck Lee
characters.description: Chuck LeeAnime (2023)Kanjiチャック・リーRomajiChakku RīDebutEpisode 1:Noman's LandAppears inTrigun StampedeRaceHumanVoice ActorTomokazu Sugita (Japanese)StatusUnknownChuck Lee(チャック・リー,Chakku Rī) is a high-ranking military police officer of the city of July. Having heard information about Humanoid Typhoon, a thug who goes around killing people and robbing plants in various places, he has come to search for him near the remote western town of Geneola Rock. At Roberto's provocation, he decides to duel with Vash.

characters.name: Clair
characters.description: ClairAnime (1998)DebutQuick DrawFamilyNeil Clairis a resident ofMay City. She isNeil's mother and appeared in the anime episodeQuick Draw. Clair has long midnight blue hair tied back in a ponytail by a purple ribbon and blue eyes. She wears a lavender-colored top with a beige-colored apron with a yellow mouthless face on it over it, a red skirt, and white shoes. Clair is a kind and charismatic woman.
characters.personality_section: Clair is a kind and charismatic woman.

characters.name: Cliff Schezar
characters.description: Cliff SchezarAnime (1998)DebutEpisode 2:Truth of MistakeAppears inTrigun (anime)RaceHuman Cliff Schezaris the son of aPlantengineer who purchased land with copious amounts of water on it and as a result. He makes a lucrative profit selling water to the town. Cliff has neatly combed dark brown hair, a mustache, and brown eyes. He wears a black suit. Cliff shows himself to be clever and observant, even mentioning to an infatuatedVashthat he toldMarianneto keep her curtains shut as an extra precaution while likely knowing full well Marianne was the intruder. He was also able to figure out how Vash was dodging his shots, something that no other ordinary human is able to notice within the series. Cliff is also adamant to keep his luxurious way of life at any cost. He is eventually arrested by Marianne thanks to Vash's help.

characters.name: Descartes
characters.description: DescartesAnime (2023)Anime (1998)MangaKanjiデカルトRomajiDekarutoAppears inTrigun StampedeRaceHuman CyborgKanjiデカルトRomajiDekarutoDebutEpisode 1:The $$60,000,000,000 ManRaceHuman CyborgDebutTM Chapter 7RaceHuman CyborgStatusDeceased Descartes(デカルト,Dekaruto) is a large bandit who was afterVash the Stampede. Descartes possesses a giant cybernetic arm with an attached boomerang which is his primary weapon. He has a green mohawk, screws implanted into his head and left arm, and elongated earlobes. Descartes wears a red tank top and brown pants. Descartes is noted for being a notorious womanizer as well as ruthless towards people even his own men who disobey or disagree with him.
characters.personality_section: Descartes is noted for being a notorious womanizer as well as ruthless towards people even his own men who disobey or disagree with him.

characters.name: Dick Bostok
characters.description: Dick BostokAnime (1998)DebutLove and PeaceHeight5'10" (178cm)FamilyStefany Bostok Dick "Grim Reaper" Bostokis a wealthy landowner. Dick has charcoal-colored hair with ash gray tints, a long and unconnected thin mustache and brown eyes. He wears a black suit. Although, he was once known as "Grim Reaper Bostok" a murderous criminal who acquired a large fortune through unscrupulous means. Dick is shown to deeply care for hisdaughterand is left disconcerted when she's held hostage byIngwayand his men.

characters.name: Dominique the Cyclops
characters.description: Dominique the CyclopsAnime (1998)MangaDebutEpisode 15:Demon's EyeAppears inTrigun (anime)RaceHuman, with power modificationsStatusDeceasedDebutChapter 18: A Gathering Of DemonsRaceHuman, with power modificationsStatusDeceased –Dominique the Cyclops Dominique the Cyclopsis the 2nd member (3rd in the manga) of theGung-Ho-Guns. Dominique was overall confident in her gunman skills and abilities, mainly due to her special ability. She's left disconcerted that Vash was able to overcome it.

characters.name: Elendira the Crimsonnail
characters.description: Elendira the CrimsonnailAnime (2023)MangaKanjiエレンディラ・ザ・クリムゾンネイルDebutEpisode 3:Bright Light, Shine through the DarknessAppears inTrigun StampedeRaceHuman-PlantHybridVoice ActorAyumu Murase(Japanese)Molly Searcy(English)StatusAliveKanjiエレンディラ・ザ・クリムゾンネイルDebutChapter 20:Fifth MoonAppears inTrigun MaxiumRaceHumanStatusDeceased Molly Searcy(English) Elendira the Crimsonnail(エレンディラ・ザ・クリムゾンネイル,,Erendira za Kurimuzoneiru?)is referred to as the lost thirteenth in the manga. She is considered the strongest of theGung-ho-Guns. In bothTrigun StampedeandTrigun Maximum, Elendira is loyal toMillions Knives. At times, she shows jealousy towardLegato Bluesummers. The relationship between The Crimsonnail and Bluesummers can be described as competitive in loyalty to Knives. They do whatever they can to get the title of most loyal to their boss.

characters.name: Elizabeth
characters.description: ElizabethAnime (1998)DebutEpisode 6:Lost JulyRaceHuman Elizabethis a plant technician hired to repair the plant atInepril City. Elizabeth is a beautiful woman with brown hair tied back in a bun and blue eyes. She wears a violet hat and a revealing dress with a lavender ribbon wrapped around her dress, and gold bowtie earrings. Elizabeth carries a pink parasol on her person. Coming off as a calm charismatic woman, Elizabeth claims she knows everything there is to know aboutVash. In truth, she's a cold-hearted woman that wants to kill Vash for revenge of what he did atJulythat caused the death of her parents. She is not actually so cruel as she seems, she just thought that Vash was a terrible person because of the events of July, but she is a woman who actually likes to help others and wants to do what's good. When she understands Vash, she shows her grief for trying to kill the same man that helped her when she was a kid, proving that she is just a woman hurted by the past.

characters.name: Father Nebraska
characters.description: Father NebraskaAnime (2023)Anime (1998)MangaDebutEpisode 2:The Running ManRaceHumanVoice ActorShigeru Chiba (Japanese)StatusAliveFamilyGofsef(Son)DebutHard Puncher (anime)RaceCyborg HumanHeight6'5"Weight62 pgsFamilyNebraska Family(Full Family)Chinpei Nebraska(Son)Tonkichi Nebraska(Son)Marilyn Nebraska(Daughter)Gofsef Nebraska(Son)Kanta Nebraska(Son)Patricia Nebraska(wife)DebutChapter 2RaceCyborg HumanHeight6'5"Weight62 pgsFamilyNebraska Family(Full Family)Chinpei Nebraska(Son)Tonkichi Nebraska(Son)Marilyn Nebraska(Daughter)Gofsef Nebraska(Son)Kanta Nebraska(Son)Patricia Nebraska(wife) Father Nebraskais the patriarch of theNebraska family. He is a gaunt, ugly little man with little hair, a monocle, and three teeth in his mouth. Father Nebraska is a loud, cruel, and heartless individual. However, he's shown to care deeply for his family especially his sonGofsef.
characters.personality_section: Father Nebraska is a loud, cruel, and heartless individual. However, he's shown to care deeply for his family especially his sonGofsef.

characters.name: Frank Marlon
characters.description: Frank MarlonAnime (1998)DebutPeace MakerRaceHumanHeight5'8" (174cm) Frank Marlonis a gunsmith fromWarrens City. Frank has brown hair in a pompadour style, dark blue eyes, and a bit of stubble on his upper lip and chin. He wears dark mustard and black coat over a beige shirt, brown pants, and shoes. Due to the incident of selling a weapon that was used to not only rob a bank, but kill his wife and child in the process. Frank became a lecherous alcoholic. Thanks to Vash, however, he sobers up.
characters.personality_section: Due to the incident of selling a weapon that was used to not only rob a bank, but kill his wife and child in the process. Frank became a lecherous alcoholic. Thanks to Vash, however, he sobers up.

characters.name: Gasback
characters.description: GasbackAnime (1998)Appears inTrigun: Badlands RumbleRaceHumanHeight6'7" (200cm)FamilyAmelia Ann McFly(Daughter) Gasbackis the main antagonist of the 2010 Trigun movie,Trigun: Badlands Rumble. Gasback has thick maroon hair with a single orange stripe in the middle, a muttonchop, and blue eyes. An incident involving the betrayal of his former comrades makes him lose the use of his right eye, so making him wear an eye patch over it. Gasback takes great pride in his notoriety as the biggest bank robber. He believes that the whole world is corrupted place where one robbs anothers. Because of that he wants to become symbol of it, as the biggest robber in the world. He is a powerfully built, intelligent, cunning, and highly driven bandit who only executes the most difficult and rewarding robberies.
